task_completion.description: Segment the cells and generate a Euclidean Distance Map (EDM) of the intercellular space.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fiji/ImageJ interface showing the loaded 'cell_image.tif', a segmented binary mask of the cells, and/or a generated Euclidean Distance Map (EDM) showing distance gradients in the background space.

task_completion.description: Save the Euclidean Distance Map to distance_map.tif.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer, terminal command (e.g., ls), or Fiji save dialog confirming 'distance_map.tif' is saved in '~/Fiji_Data/results/spacing/'.

task_completion.description: Extract cell measurements and save to cell_measurements.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'cell_measurements.csv' visible in a text editor, terminal output, or Fiji Results table, containing the required columns: cell_id, centroid_x, centroid_y, area_px, and nn_dist.

task_completion.description: Generate a summary report with specific spatial metrics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text file named 'spacing_report.txt' visible in an editor or terminal output, containing the keys: num_cells, cell_coverage_percent, mean_nn_distance_px, edm_mean_px, and edm_max_px.

task_completion.description: Save a visual QC overlay showing the original image with cell outlines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image named 'qc_overlay.png' visible in an image viewer, Fiji, or file explorer, clearly showing the original microscopy image with outlines or borders drawn around the segmented cells.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used Fiji/ImageJ to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Fiji GUI (menus, toolbars, image windows) or a Fiji macro/Python script being written and executed, rather than using unrelated tools.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not hardcode the output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal commands like 'echo' being used to write fake, hardcoded numbers directly into 'spacing_report.txt' or 'cell_measurements.csv' without prior calculation.

integrity.description: Verify the QC overlay is genuinely generated from the input image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'qc_overlay.png' should visually match the cell structures seen in the original 'cell_image.tif', confirming it is a real overlay and not a copied placeholder image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input image is a synthetic fluorescence microscopy image from the BBBC005 dataset. The pixel scale is 0.65 µm/pixel. Expected output files are: distance_map.tif, cell_measurements.csv, spacing_report.txt, and qc_overlay.png, all located in ~/Fiji_Data/results/spacing/.
